steps.title: Set up
steps.content: Each tablet costs 180 dollars. Including 6% tax, the cost per tablet is $$180\times 1.06=190.80.$$ If the school orders $n$ tablets, the total must be no more than 3,600 dollars: $$190.80n \leq 3600$$

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
$$n \leq \frac{3600}{190.80} \approx 18.87$$
Round down to the nearest whole number: $n = 18$.
